message:
fix(linux): Ctrl shortcuts and clean exit on Linux

- Fix Ctrl+Q and other Ctrl shortcuts not working on Linux
  (shortcut_mod check was blocking Ctrl keys since Ctrl is the shortcut modifier)
- Fix app hanging on exit on Linux by using socket shutdown() and
  detaching reader thread instead of joining (join hangs on Linux)
- Add alternate screen buffer functions (not currently used)
- Add deinit debug logging to log file for troubleshooting
